name: Hot and Sour Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 lb firm tofu, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and boned the chicken breasts.
2. Cut the chicken into 1/8 inch slices.
3. Stir the chicken slices with 1 tablespoon soy sauce in a bowl.
4. Cook the chicken in oil in a Dutch oven until tender, about 3 minutes.
5. Remove the chicken and add the remaining soy sauce to the pan with the next seven ingredients.
6. Heat to boiling, stirring frequently, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
7. Add the chicken and tofu, bring to boil over medium heat.
8. In a small bowl, stir cornstarch and 1/3 cup water until smooth.
9. Gradually add the mixture to the simmering soup until slightly thickened and smooth.
10. Beat the eggs in another small bowl and slowly pour into the soup, stirring gently until set.
11. Top with green onion.
